creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Created attachment 225799
git diff

- Upstream does not make releases very often while significant bugfixes are committed now and than. Last release was Feb 2020.
- Upgrade the port to the same version as is included in DragonflyBSD: https://lists.dragonflybsd.org/pipermail/commits/2021-May/820180.html
- I think this versioning scheme is flexible enough to follow 0.14 in the future might that release ever happen.
- One patch (patch-crypto.c) is obsolete now.
